parse-template.doc:name: Parse Template
parse-template.content: #[vars.emailBody]

email:send.doc:name: Email Send deposit amount
email:send.subject: #["Amount Withdraw is successful Today! " ++ vars.BANKNAME as String]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Success", statusCode: 200, message: "Amount debited successfully for Account Number - " ++ (vars.accountNumber as String), data: { transactionId: "TXN-" ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyyMMddHHmmss"}), currency: "INR", withdrawTime: now(), 'type': "Withdraw", amount: vars.amount, balance: vars.BALANCE } }
